Language of Instruction

No more than 9 credits of the 36 total required may be satisﬁed by courses taught in English. With the approval of the German Studies advisor, 6 of the 9 credits may be taken outside the department.

2 German Studies Major

GRADUATION PLANS

Click here (https://www.arhu.umd.edu/academics/advising/academic- plans/) for roadmaps for graduation plans in the College of Arts and Humanities.

Additional information on developing a graduation plan can be found on the following pages:

• http://4yearplans.umd.edu

• the Student Academic Success-Degree Completion Policy (https:// academiccatalog.umd.edu/undergraduate/registration-academic- requirements-regulations/academic-advising/#success) section of this catalog
